summary: M5 desktop lands — macOS-style shell smokes, first apps, Reflection keyboard input, Depth, e1000 DHCP, and AC97 PCM playback.
M4 graphics smoke lands — framebuffer display syscalls, Reflection, pond-surface IPC, Lily surface helper, Skipstone text metadata, and VirtIO-GPU discovery/fallback.
M3 userspace lands — Spring, capability IPC, process lifecycle, PS/2-backed TTY, Depth/Shore, and libpersona.
M2 pipeline lands — PCI enumeration, VFS, NVMe block driver, PondFS (RW), real ELF init, and an expanded syscall surface.
Warning-free build — kernel and bootloader now pass `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, plus a stable-feature and raw-pointer cleanup pass.
Boot path is sound again — fixes the HHDM-before-CR3 fault, a nightly build break, and several correctness landmines.
